name: Acorn Squash and Sweet Potato
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb sweet potatoes, pared and cubed (about 5 cups)
1 small acorn squash, quartered and seeded, pared (about 4 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion in broth or water in a large saucepan over medium heat until translucent, about 6 minutes.
2. Add sweet potatoes, squash, and chicken broth (13 3/4 oz) to the pan.
3. Simmer, covered, until vegetables are tender, about 25 minutes.
4. Cool slightly.
5. Working in batches, transfer the veggies with their liquid into a food processor and puree.
6. Return the puree to the saucepan.
7. Stir in nonfat milk (1/2 teaspoon) for desired consistency.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Heat over low heat.
10. Top each serving with a dollop of nonfat sour cream and a sprinkle of nutmeg, if desired.
